---
title: "test_main_loop_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_main_loop_empire.py"
loc: 17
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.90
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.02
---

## Intent
The `test_main_loop_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_shutdown_handler, test_highlander_check. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_shutdown_handler, test_highlander_check. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [signal](file://signal)
- [src.sentinel.main_loop](file://src.sentinel.main_loop)
- [os](file://os)
- [psutil](file://psutil)

### Exports
- `test_shutdown_handler`
- `test_highlander_check`
